subject: Warp 1.07 & 1.06 crashes in boxnet2mask retraining
body:
Dear all,
Hi, I'm trying to use warp for picking gold beads, first I ran particle 
picking using boxnet2mask model for 25 micrographs, then I cleaned the 
picked out mask, then when I try to retrain that model, warp always 
crashed. I tried both warp 1.0.7 & 1.0.6, both version gave me the same 
error message back. Crash message have been attached.
I'm using Windows 10 pro with two Rtx 2080 Super GPU, 128GB RAM, 1x Intel 
Xeon W-2135 CPU.
I've seen a similar question but no answer, could anyone help me out here?
Thank you very much in advance!
Yours sincerely,
Linhua Tai
